# misp_server (Data Source)

Look up a MISP sync server by its numeric id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_server" "peer" {
  id = "5"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Numeric server id.

### Read-Only

- `authkey` (String, Sensitive)
- `caching_enabled` (Boolean)
- `internal` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `organization` (String)
- `publish_without_email` (Boolean)
- `pull` (Boolean)
- `pull_galaxy_clusters` (Boolean)
- `push` (Boolean)
- `push_galaxy_clusters` (Boolean)
- `push_sightings` (Boolean)
- `remote_org_id` (String)
- `self_signed` (Boolean)
- `skip_proxy` (Boolean)
- `unpublish_event` (Boolean)
- `url` (String)
